title: Aurora Station
description: A small research crew on a remote orbital station investigates a signal that seems to predict accidents before they happen.
display_text: Aurora Station. Genres: Science Fiction, Thriller, Mystery. Plot: A small research crew on a remote orbital station investigates a signal that seems to predict accidents before they happen.

title: The Orchard House
description: Three generations gather at a family farm after a quiet inheritance dispute and slowly rebuild their relationships over one summer.
display_text: The Orchard House. Genres: Drama, Family. Plot: Three generations gather at a family farm after a quiet inheritance dispute and slowly rebuild their relationships over one summer.

title: Night Market
description: A food critic and a street musician keep crossing paths across a city's late-night markets while chasing the same missing recipe book.
display_text: Night Market. Genres: Romance, Comedy. Plot: A food critic and a street musician keep crossing paths across a city's late-night markets while chasing the same missing recipe book.

title: Echoes of the Trial
description: A retired court reporter returns to a landmark case after discovering that a key testimony may have been mistranscribed.
display_text: Echoes of the Trial. Genres: Drama, Mystery, Legal Thriller. Plot: A retired court reporter returns to a landmark case after discovering that a key testimony may have been mistranscribed.

title: Trail North
description: A documentary follows two novice hikers preparing for a demanding mountain route while learning from local guides and rescue teams.
display_text: Trail North. Genres: Documentary, Adventure. Plot: A documentary follows two novice hikers preparing for a demanding mountain route while learning from local guides and rescue teams.
